description_long: This object is a fixed-blade utility knife featuring a straight, single-edged blade made of dark, likely stainless steel. The blade is slender and tapers to a fine point, suitable for precision cutting tasks. The handle is crafted from polished wood, ergonomically contoured for a comfortable grip, and has a natural brown finish with visible wood grain. There is a subtle metal collar at the junction between the blade and handle, providing structural reinforcement. The knife lacks any visible guard or crossguard, giving it a streamlined appearance. No decorative engravings or ornamentation are present, and the object does not include a sheath.
description: A straight-bladed utility knife with a dark steel blade and a polished wooden handle, featuring a simple, ergonomic design without ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dark blade and the wooden handle with visible grain.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, highlighting its rounded, ergonomic shape and the thin blade profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the straight blade and the smooth wooden handle.
description_view_3: Blade tip view, emphasizing the pointed blade and the circular end of the handle.
attribute_handle_design: contoured polished wood, smooth, rounded end, ergonomic
